title: Efficient Machine Learning
description: We develop algorithms and architectures that reduce the computational cost of training and inference for large-scale machine learning models. Our work spans neural architecture search, model compression, and hardware-aware optimization.

title: Scientific Discovery with AI
description: We apply machine learning to accelerate scientific discovery in domains such as biology, chemistry, and climate science. Key themes include physics-informed neural networks, generative models for molecular design, and uncertainty quantification.

title: Robust and Reliable AI
description: We study the reliability of machine learning systems under distribution shift, adversarial inputs, and data scarcity. Our goal is to develop methods that are provably robust and produce calibrated uncertainty estimates.
